entry.title: 使用tebi作为s3,搭建nix缓存服务器
entry.summary: A step-by-step guide on how to set up a high-performance Nix binary cache server using TEBI as an S3-compatible storage backend. Learn how to speed up your Nix builds and reduce bandwidth costs by self-hosting your cache.
